title: lepia multiflora
intro: Lepia multiflora, also known as the Chinese club moss or Selaginella, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lepia multiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Lepia multiflora is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
